title: Illagers Attack Babies
description: Illagers now attack baby villagers. Because why not.
body:
# Illagers Attack Babies

Illagers now attack baby villagers. Because why not.

![an in-game image of a vindicator attacking a baby villager](https://github.com/diacritics-owo/illagers-attack-babies/raw/main/images/vindicator.png)
*A vindicator about to deal a fatal blow to a baby villager*
